codeReview.summary: Reviewed the redo feature definition, redo handoff/transcript skeleton, prior synthesis, prior reviews for `fix-ext-recording-await` and `fix-ext-message-factory-compat`, the original failed fix handoffs, and the clean redo commit chain `fd7b043` -> `4b37c99` -> `193c304`. The original blocking issues are resolved: `packages/extension/background/message-handlers-recording.ts:23-33` again awaits `recordingCoordinator.selectImages()` inside an async try/catch, and `packages/extension/ai/message-factory.ts:5-12,131-136` again accepts legacy top-level `arguments` plus `func`/`tool` aliases when normalizing tool calls. Scope/version-bump concerns are also resolved: `git show --stat` for `4b37c99` and `193c304` shows only the relevant functional file changed in each commit, and current version metadata remains `0.4.60` in `package.json:3`, `packages/extension/manifest.json:4`, and `packages/extension/manifest.firefox.json:15`. No remaining blocking or non-blocking code issues were identified in this redo.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The repo guidance and the refactor-worker skill are now out of sync on how to avoid auto version bumps. This redo succeeded by using the newer `DISABLE_VERSION_BUMP=1` flow, but the skill still tells workers to use `--no-verify` when version bumps appear.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `AGENTS.md:12-22` documents `DISABLE_VERSION_BUMP=1 git commit ...` as the supported way to make clean commits after the hook change, while `.factory/skills/refactor-worker/SKILL.md:123-125` still says to bypass auto-bumping hooks with `--no-verify`.

summary: Pass. The clean redo fully resolves the two prior fix-review blockers: the recording await/error-path behavior and the message-factory legacy alias compatibility are both restored, and the replacement commits no longer bundle any package or manifest version bumps.
